overview: A comprehensive portal on ancient Indian mind control techniques for anger and stress management. Features authentic wisdom from the Vedas, Upanishads, Yoga Sutras, and Charaka Samhita with beautiful Ayurvedic visual design.
features: Hero section with founder story and biography
Mind control technique library with 6+ techniques (Pranayama, Mudras, Dhyana, Mantras, Herbs, Sattvavajaya)
Detailed technique guides with Sanskrit origins, step-by-step instructions, Dosha alignment, and historical text references
Search and category filtering (Breathing, Meditation, Gestures, Herbs, Philosophy)
Knowledge Hub with Ayurvedic philosophy, ancient texts timeline, and key concepts
Warm Ayurvedic visual theme with saffron, gold, and earth tones
Responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
